name: rhetorlint-spec
description: The RhetorLint specification: a portable taxonomy of rhetorical tells + a JSON output schema, with a zero-dependency reference engine. Marks manipulation in the words; never reads the person.

scripts.test: node --test test/analyze.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/conformance.test.mjs test/package-types.test.mjs test/signals.test.mjs test/widget-build.test.mjs
